description: Style Note  jeans are a man's best friend. Skinny, slouchy, straight-legged or flared, these denims look great with anything and everything. Team this jeans from french connection with a bright tee with a bold graphic print or throw over a blazer for that daper look and be make your own style statement    Product Details  Black jeans made of blended fabric, has side pockets on the front, back pockets, comfortable waistband with loops, brand badge appliqued on the waistband at the back and a button and zipper closure on the front   Material and Care  Blended fabric  Wash with similar colours  Iron on reverse side    Size and Fit  Regular Fit  The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
